sharingTitle: Cabin in Mariposa · ★4.97 · 1 bedroom · 2 beds · 1 private bath

description.html:
About 1 hr from Yosemite and 20 min from downtown Mariposa, this cabin offers a place to relax and unwind. Exclusive access to the entire cabin, outdoor kitchen, and BBQ.

“The stars from the jacuzzi were the best I’ve ever seen” - Leslie

“Definitely one of the best Airbnbs out there” - Dulce

“Possibly the comfiest bed I’ve slept in” - Alexis & Riley

“Outdoor kitchen, hot tub, stars… an absolute dream!” - Delaram

description.title: The space
description.html: The cabin is fully remodeled with modern stainless steel appliances, propane-powered range, and granite counters. Heating and AC is at the ready, as well as high speed internet (25Mbps; cell service is spotty but WiFi calling works great!). Behind the house is an outdoor kitchen equipped with a BBQ, hot tub, and disco ball! On a clear night, you'll have an incredible view of the stars. 420 friendly but outside only, please.

description.title: Guest access
description.html: You'll have the 1-bedroom cabin exclusively to yourself. The outdoor kitchen and BBQ is also exclusively for use of cabin guests. The hot tub is a shared amenity with guests in our neighboring Airbnb, however, it's rare that guests cross paths and, when they do, embrace it as an opportunity to meet fellow travelers, share tips about their travels, and make new friends.

description.title: Other things to note
description.html:
We keep the cabin squeaky clean and we disinfect between every guest. Please keep our community safe by complying with local county and state policies.

Don't forget to pack your patience and sense of adventure. Living in the woods has its pitfalls from time to time: pests, power outages, and inclement weather, to name a few. We strive for every guest to have a perfect stay and are prepared for almost anything. Still, things do come up and we thank you in advance for your understanding.

highlights.title: 40-min drive to Yosemite National Park
highlights.subtitle: This home is near the national park.

highlights.title: Self check-in
highlights.subtitle: Check yourself in with the keypad.

highlights.title: Comfy bed for better sleep
highlights.subtitle: The room-darkening shades and extra bedding are loved by guests.

images.caption: The bedroom features a large king bed
The living room is comfortable, with a queen mattress tucked away in the couch (pictures of that later)

locationDetails.title: Neighborhood highlights
locationDetails.html: This cabin is about 20 minutes from downtown Mariposa, which is full of cute shops and cafes. Grab a coffee at Moonbow, a bite to eat at 1850 Brewery, and a beer at The Alley (or Hideout if you're feeling adventurous). High Country Health Foods has vegetarian and vegan options and Pioneer Market can be your one-stop-shop for groceries and beverages. Our place is also about 20 minutes fro Oakhurst, where there's more restaurants and grocery stores. Depending on which way you come in, there's a grocery store on your way.

previewAmenities.title: Shared hot tub - available all year, open 24 hours

amenities.title: Essentials
amenities.subtitle: Towels, bed sheets, soap, and toilet paper

amenities.title: Wifi – 21 Mbps
amenities.subtitle: Verified by speed test. Stream HD videos.

amenities.title: Kitchen
amenities.subtitle: Space where guests can cook their own meals

amenities.title: Cooking basics
amenities.subtitle: Pots and pans, oil, salt and pepper

amenities.title: Barbecue utensils
amenities.subtitle: Grill, charcoal, bamboo skewers/iron skewers, etc.

amenities.title: Private backyard – Not fully fenced
amenities.subtitle: An open space on the property usually covered in grass

amenities.title: Shared hot tub - available all year, open 24 hours
Luggage dropoff allowed
amenities.subtitle: For guests' convenience when they have early arrival or late departure

amenities.title: Long term stays allowed
amenities.subtitle: Allow stay for 28 days or more

amenities.title: Keypad
amenities.subtitle: Check yourself into the home with a door code

amenities.title: Exterior security cameras on property
amenities.subtitle: There are external security cameras that cover the outdoor spaces

photos.caption: The living room is comfortable, with a queen mattress tucked away in the couch (pictures of that later)
When you walk in the front door, you'll enter an open floor plan room, where the living room and kitchen share a warm, beautiful space
Another view of the couch with comfortable queen mattress tucked away inside. The chest to the left is full of bedding.
The queen mattress unfolds from the couch and bedding is available in the wicker chest
Board games if you get bored and WiFi is available for guests
There's no official dining room at the cabin but this bar comfortably seats 4 at counter height stools
Stainless steel range
Enjoy coffee the easy way with a drip machine or take the time to make a pour over
Looking back out of the kitchen into the laundry room
The bedroom features a large king bed
From the corner of the bedroom you can see into the bathroom and the living room
The view from the bathroom from the bedroom. Shampoo, conditioner, and soap are provided
The bathroom also features a heated toilet seat and bidet
Come out the back door of the cabin to the outdoor kitchen—perfect for grilling and cooking outside
Dinning in the outdoor kitchen
Grill and fridge outside (the sink does not work at the moment)
If you're into it, we can also transform the outdoor space into your own personal night club!
Laundry is available to guests through the bathroom at the back of the cabin
Exterior image 1
Exterior image 2
We get some snow from time to time! When we do, getting up the driveway can be tricky. But it doesn't usually stick for long.
Soak in the hot tub by day or by night under the stars.
We helped a couple with a maternity photoshoot (ala iPhone) on the property.
A birds-eye view

host.name: Avand
host.about: I grew up in Boston, lived in Chicago, San Francisco, and now I live in Mariposa. I've lived in several cities across the US and visited a handful of countries. I enjoy the socializing, and the outdoors. I love music and DJ house music.
